The check should be performed each time when a new record is written into CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP with TXN_RLTNP_TP_ID = 69 and update the flag for both TRGT_TXN_ID and SRC_TXN_ID, if TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID. Note: TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID is needed because it is possible that cancellation trade points to itself when the original trade that is being cancelled is not found. In this case Cancelled Flag should not be set to 'Y'
